titleStmt.title: SII 6.839: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 839. (A.R. No. 284-P of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . satpātrō bhūsuva¨rnnāṁśukamukhanikhiladravyasaṁppadguṇāḍhyassanmānya
ssa jāta mavibhavaṁ bhāvayat bhāvavēdī . Utsāhādi triśaktiprakaṭananamitā
śēṣasāmaṁtava[¨r]ggō maṁtrī śrībhīmanā¨ryyō bhuvi jayatu cirammaṁḍalēśōrukī
¨rttiḥ . 1 śākēbdē śailanāgāruṇaparigaṇitē māsi cāṣāḍasaijñē saptamyāṁ kṛṣṇapakṣē
suragurudivasē siṁhaśailēśvarasya . sōyaṁ snānāya kuṁbhadvayamakṛtakṛtē¨rnni
ttyamānētumaṁbhō vṛttiṁ śaṁkhādisanmaṁgaḷaruciratarāḥ paṭṭikāścāṣṭa
pātraṁ . 2 Ēkā khaṁḍājyayuktādhikamadhurapayaścāṣṭakuṁbhājyasiddhān
prādādgāstatvasaṁkhyāstadavanakṛtayē vallabhasyādhivṛttiṁ . sadbhaktyācaṁdratāraṁ sakala
sukṛtasāmrājyasaṁvṛddhahētō¨rddhammairētaissutuṣṭō narahariraniśaṁ pātu(ṁ) śrībhīma
pātraṁ . 3 śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1287 gunēṁṭi Āṣāḍha bahaḷa saptamiyu
guruvāramunāṁḍu Oḍḍadi bhīmanapegaḍa tanaku
Iṣṭā¨rtthasiddhiparipū¨rttigā śrīnarasiṁhanādhuniki nityamu
nnu tana peṭṭina veṁḍikaḍuvaluku
śrīrāmanāyuniki nēḍipēṭanu puṭaṁḍu kṣētramu peṭenu dhūpā
vasarāna Aṣṭamaṁgaḷālakuṁ beṭṭina veṁḍiṟekulu Enimidi māpaṭi dhūpā
vasarānaku nityamunnu kuṁceṁḍu Ajyavaṭani pālu teccipeṭanu siṁ
girikillāri koḍuku caṁdrukillārivaśamuna beṭina mōdālu ĪruvaiĒ
nu 25 Ītani jītānaku cōḍavarānanu puṭṭaṁḍu kṣētramu peṭṭenu . Ī pālu Āra
giṁppaṁ beṭṭina veṁḍikuḍuka Okaṁḍu nitya Arapala mēṟa [A]khaṁḍunaku nē
tikinni śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdu padmanidhigā beṭṭina gaṁḍamāḍalu padi Iṁtavaṭu dha¨rmmuU
nnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigaṁ jellaṁgaladu . Ī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Ī bhīmanapeggaḍa tanaku niṣṭā¨rtthasiddhigā nityamunu pavalu sahasranāma reṁḍu
janamu narasiṁhakavacamu Okarunnu japiṁci Aṁdu padakṣina 1
vidiyasahasranāma Okarunnu narasiṁhakavacamu Oka
runnu japiṁci Annādapradakṣiṇāyana peṭṭenu pradāni narasiṁhajīya
naku lakumāvaramaṁdu nuThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 6.839 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
